title: Misty DOI — Automation-first DOI minting and research artifact publication packaging
description: Misty DOI turns a single canonical metadata file into a complete, reproducible publication package (Zenodo deposit, DataCite record, codemeta.json, CITATION.cff, SHA-256 checksums, OpenTimestamps proofs) and mints a DOI on Zenodo. Browser-first, CLI-first, automation-first; no backend, no subscription, no vendor lock-in. The token is read only from the environment or held only in the browser tab. General-purpose: publishes software, datasets, papers, posters, presentations, images, videos, lessons, and workflows for any author. Copyright (C) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary.
